zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Middleton於大約1244年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir Robert de Middelton31歲，母親Hugonis26歲。他於1268年與Agnes Lavenham在英國英格蘭越可爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年42歲，埋葬在英國越可爾易爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Middleton于大约1244年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Middelton31岁，母亲Hugonis26岁。他于1268年与Agnes Lavenham在英国英格兰越可爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1285年在英国英格兰越可爾享年42岁，埋葬在英国越可爾易爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Middleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Middleton was born about 1244, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Middelton, was 31 and his mother, Hugonis, was 26. He married Agnes Lavenham in 1268, in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1285, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Ilkley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Middleton est né environ 1244, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Middelton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hugonis, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Lavenham en 1268, à Middleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1285, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Ilkley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Middleton um 1244 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Middelton 31 und seine Mutter Hugonis 26. Er hat 1268 in Middleton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Lavenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1285 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ilkley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Middleton è nato il circa 1244 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Middelton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Hugonis, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Lavenham nel 1268, nel Middleton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1285, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Ilkley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Middletonが約1244年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Middeltonは31歳，母Hugonisは26歳であった。1268年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレトンでAgnes Lavenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1285年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで42歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアイルクリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Middleton(이)가 대략 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Middelton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Hugonis(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레턴에서 Agnes Lavenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 이클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Middleton nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Middelton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hugonis, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Lavenham em 1268, em Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1285, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilkley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Middleton родился около 1244 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Middelton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hugonis, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Lavenham в 1268 г. в местности миддлетон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1285 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности илкли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Middleton nació aproximadamente 1244, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Middelton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Hugonis, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnes Lavenham en 1268, en Middleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1285, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Ilkley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
